name: Gridlines
description: Indian KYC verification API suite for identity, address, bank, GST and fraud checks with single integration.

seo.title: Gridlines — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Gridlines: Indian KYC verification API suite for identity, address, bank, GST and fraud checks with single integration.

when_to_use: Aadhaar OTP verification for Indian KYC onboarding
PAN card validation for financial account opening in India
Bank account penny-drop verification for payout platforms
GST number verification for B2B marketplace onboarding
Driving license and voter ID check for telecom KYC

pros: India-specific checks: Aadhaar, PAN, GST, bank
Single integration covers the whole KYC stack
Fraud and address checks tuned for Indian data
Faster than stitching 5+ regulator APIs yourself
cons: Competes in crowded market with Signzy, Surepass
Regulatory changes in India force frequent updates
review.verdict: India KYC aggregator API; worth comparing head-to-head with Signzy and Surepass on price and SLAs.
review.best_for: Indian fintechs and lenders wanting one API across Aadhaar, PAN, GST and bank verification
review.not_for: Teams building outside India or needing global identity verification beyond Indian regulators
